name: mcpscraper-sdk-monorepo
description: Public client SDKs and API contracts for mcpscraper.dev and memory.mcpscraper.dev

scripts.test:python: cd packages/scraper-python && uv run pytest && cd ../memory-python && uv run pytest
scripts.verify:parity: npm run build --workspace=mcpscraper-memory-sdk && tsx scripts/verify-sdk-parity.ts && uv run --project packages/scraper-python python scripts/verify_sdk_parity.py
